---
title: "Cryptocurrency Risk Analytics Platform"
author: "Elliot Yang"
date: today
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(quantmod)

getSymbols(c("BTC-USD",
             "ETH-USD",
             "SOL-USD",
             "BNB-USD"),
           src = "yahoo",
           from = "2020-01-01")
```

```{r}

```
